basic_details.job_title: TMC ACTREC Diesel Mechanic Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: TMC Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (TMC ACTREC)
basic_details.short_information: TMC Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (TMC ACTREC) has published the Diesel Mechanic Recruitment 2026 notification. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Diesel Mechanic position on a contract basis. Candidates up to 33 years of age with an SSC pass, ITI in Diesel Mechanic (1-year course) from a Government-recognized institution/NCVT certificate, and 3 years of relevant experience are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 24 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 33 years. Age may be relaxed on experience basis.

qualification.education_qualification: SSC pass with ITI in Diesel Mechanic (1-year course) from Govt. recognized Institution / NCVT certificate with 3 years’ experience in handling of D.G. Sets and other electromechanical equipment’s
qualification.details: Diesel Mechanic: SSC pass with ITI in Diesel Mechanic (1-year course) from Govt. recognized Institution / NCVT certificate with 3 years’ experience in handling of D.G. Sets and other electromechanical equipment’s. Willing to work in shift duties including nights, Sundays and Holidays. Preference will be given to candidate worked with OEM.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download TMC ACTREC Diesel Mechanic Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download TMC ACTREC Diesel Mechanic Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: TMC ACTREC Diesel Mechanic Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.tmc_advanced_centre_for_treatment_resear: SSC pass with ITI in Diesel Mechanic (1-year course) from Govt. recognized Institution / NCVT certificate with 3 years’ experience in handling of D.G. Sets and other electromechanical equipment’s

content_sections.heading: TMC ACTREC Diesel Mechanic Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the TMC ACTREC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download TMC ACTREC Diesel Mechanic Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Diesel Mechanic: SSC pass with ITI in Diesel Mechanic (1-year course) from Govt. recognized Institution / NCVT certificate with 3 years’ experience in handling of D.G. Sets and other electromechanical equipment’s. Willing to work in shift duties including nights, Sundays and Holidays. Preference will be given to candidate worked with OEM.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age limit is 33 years. Age may be relaxed on experience basis.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for TMC ACTREC Diesel Mechanic Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: TMC ACTREC Diesel Mechanic Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization recruiting for Diesel Mechanic posts?
faq.answer: TMC Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (TMC ACTREC) is recruiting for Diesel Mechanic positions. This is a government job opportunity for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment drive by TMC ACTREC is Diesel Mechanic.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Diesel Mechanic?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy available for the Diesel Mechanic post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for TMC ACTREC Diesel Mechanic recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Diesel Mechanic post is a Walk-in Interview. Interested candidates need to attend the interview directly on the specified date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the walk-in interview date for Diesel Mechanic?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Diesel Mechanic post is scheduled for 24 July 2026. Candidates must report on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for Diesel Mechanic?
faq.answer: Candidates must be SSC pass with ITI in Diesel Mechanic (1-year course) from a Govt. recognized Institution or hold an NCVT certificate with 3 years’ experience in handling D.G. Sets and other electromechanical equipment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for the Diesel Mechanic post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Diesel Mechanic post is 33 years. Age relaxation may be considered based on experience.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the Diesel Mechanic position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Diesel Mechanic position ranges from ₹ 26,210 to 35,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the TMC ACTREC Diesel Mechanic recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for Diesel Mechanic at TMC ACTREC?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Diesel Mechanic post involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates should prepare accordingly.
